member.name: T:CATSConsoleData.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:CATSConsoleData.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:CATSConsoleData.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: M:CATSConsoleData.ProductProfileManager.Create(FACTS.Model.product_main)
member.summary: This time,the operation have been switch to destination database, AND product_mainM comes from destination database
